data.raceName: COOKERS BULK OIL SYSTEM MAIDEN PLATE
data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. HOLDING CAPTIVE looks well placed off a most encouraging debut at Geelong, well supported there and just finding one narrowly better after leading for most of the race. He'll be better for that experience and the inside draw should see him straight to the top again. 3. BLANKFIELD resumes having placed in all four runs last campaign, showing good ability with a few close-up finishes. He can be an improver this time around and will take some beating fresh. 10. JENNI POPPINS is off a fairly long spell having run well on debut. Watch the market for a lead with her. 1. ANOTHER LINK comes over from Hong Kong. He hasn't managed to place in ten runs to date, market the best guide with him.","runners":[5,3,10,1],"exclusive":false}
